description: You are a Search Marketing Strategist auditing the frontend resources of https://books.toscrape.com/ to identify performance bottlenecks using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the list of CSS resources and the list of JavaScript resources as separate CSV files to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Create an optimization report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/frontend_resources_report.txt including the total count of CSS files, total count of JS files, and optimization recommendations.
